user.title: Create an energy center
user.description: Creates a local Matrix-style energy panel. Detailed entity mappings, PV strings and appliances are configured later inside the panel.

data_description.installation_name: A friendly name for the monitored home or site.
data_description.panel_title: Name shown in the Home Assistant sidebar.
data_description.currency: Currency code used for energy prices, for example PLN or EUR.

abort.already_configured: Matrix Energy Center is already configured.

data_description.refresh_interval: How often normalized Matrix Energy Center sensors are refreshed, in seconds.
data_description.name: Optional internal name of the config entry.

reload_configuration.name: Reload configuration
reload_configuration.description: Reloads Matrix Energy Center and its normalized sensors.

reset_configuration.name: Reset configuration
reset_configuration.description: Removes all mappings, PV strings, appliances and local settings.
